title: MS SQL Rationalization Domain Catalog Schema
description: JSON Schema for the data-domain catalog used by Phase 3 SSOT designation in the MS SQL Estate Rationalization Process. Seeds federal-typical data domains; agencies extend with mission-specific domains. Each entry declares the canonical OrgPath segment, anchor tables that identify the domain, and the typical system-of-record vendor.

document_id.description: Canon document identifier for this data file. Pinned to mssql-rationalization-domain-catalog as a stable handle.

name.description: Short identifier — unique within the catalog.

canonical_orgpath_segment.description: OrgPath segment template, agency-substituted. The placeholder <AGENCY> is replaced at runtime.

anchor_tables.description: Tables whose presence in an instance identifies it as participating in this domain.

authoritative_source_signal.description: Operational signal that identifies the agency's incumbent system-of-record (vendor name, product line, agency-specific designation).

cross_domain_dependencies.description: Other domains in the catalog that this one references.
